What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Two men stand on a red track pointing fingers upward. A man in a black tank top jogs and walks on a grassy field adjacent to the track. The man in the black tank top sits cross-legged on the ground eating from a red packet near a water bottle. Another person in a dark blue tank top walks on the red running track. A group of runners is running in the background near the start point.

canonical_answer: At 0s, two men stand on the track pointing fingers upward; at 2s, the man in the black tank top jogs forward on the grass; at 10s, he sits cross-legged consuming a red packet; at 14s, a person in a dark blue tank top walks on the red track; at 18s, a group of runners appears in the background near the start line.
